features: With 2% Vitamin C, natural fruit acids and enzymes
Both known to help enhance skin's natural glow
Ideal for dull complexion and uneven skintone
description: Product Description Creightons Vitamin C Superfruits Glow Enzyme Scrub (150ml) - An energising and exfoliating scrub with vitamin C, natural fruit acids and enzymes for clearer, radiant skin. An energising and exfoliating scrub. Infused with vitamin C, natural fruit acids and enzymes to effectively cleanse, exfoliate for healthier looking skin. Made in England. DIRECTIONS: Apply to wet skin, massage in gently, rinse thoroughly. WARNINGS: Do not use on broken, damaged or irritated skin. Avoid contact with the eyes. If contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with water. Discontinue use if irritation develops. Keep out of reach of children. Ingredients Aqua (Water), Cetearyl Alcohol, Ethylhexyl Palmitate, Cetyl Alcohol, Glycerin, Ceteareth-20, Juglans Regia (Walnut) Shell Powder, Oryza Sativa (Rice) Germ Powder, Phenoxyethanol, Triethanolamine, Dimethicone, Parfum (Fragrance), Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, 1-Methylhydantoin-2-Imide, 3-O-Ethyl Ascorbic Acid, Ethylhexylglycerin, Disodium EDTA, Citric Acid, Ananas Sativus (Pineapple) Fruit Extract, Carica Papaya (Papaya) Fruit Extract, Mangifera Indica (Mango) Fruit Extract, Limonene, Citral, CI 19140 (Yellow 5), CI 17200 (Red 33). Directions Apply to damp skin, massage gently, rinse thoroughly Safety Warning Warnings: do not use on broken, damaged or irritated skin. Avoid contact with the eyes. If contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with water. Discontinue use if irritation develops. Keep out of reach of children. See more
